timeline_events.title: Research Intern
timeline_events.summary: Cancer biology work in chronic lymphocytic leukemia with cell culture, Western blotting, and flow cytometry.

timeline_events.title: Research Intern
timeline_events.summary: Basic and translational cancer biology in chemo-resistant muscle-invasive bladder cancer.

timeline_events.title: BS Biomedical Sciences
timeline_events.summary: Sophie Davis / CCNY biomedical sciences degree path.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: Honor is verified as Cum Laude in the official CCNY commencement book; LinkedIn instead says Summa Cum Laude.

timeline_events.title: Research Trainee
timeline_events.summary: Translational cancer biology and hematologic malignancy training.

timeline_events.title: Co-author on ASH abstract: E2F1 is a biomarker of selinexor resistance
timeline_events.summary: Early multiple myeloma conference output under the Seongjee Park publication name variant.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: 32 RNA-seq patients; 26 validation patients; ORR 21% cited.

timeline_events.title: Research Assistant
timeline_events.summary: SETD8 and E2F1 work across multiple myeloma and mantle cell lymphoma with in vitro and in vivo models.

timeline_events.title: Student Intern
timeline_events.summary: Literature review on linkage to care for HIV patients and physician shadowing in HIV and family-care clinics.

timeline_events.title: Co-author on ASH abstract: Aberrant cell cycle programming confers rapid lethality
timeline_events.summary: Mantle cell lymphoma mouse-model work published in Blood 136 Supplement 1.

timeline_events.title: BS Biomedical Sciences completed
timeline_events.summary: Degree completion recorded in the CV.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: Honor verified as Cum Laude in the official CCNY commencement book.

timeline_events.title: MD Candidate
timeline_events.summary: CV documents MD candidacy but not MD completion.

timeline_events.title: Data Science Bootcamp
timeline_events.summary: Formal pivot into data science and machine learning.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: LinkedIn cites 525 hours of coursework and 5+ data science projects.

timeline_events.title: Public GitHub account creation
timeline_events.summary: Public GitHub activity begins under alisonpark3.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: Public repos snapshot later shows 21 repositories.

timeline_events.title: Brand Associate
timeline_events.summary: Data-driven sales and customer analytics role in a startup setting.

timeline_events.title: Bioinformatician
timeline_events.summary: Current role integrating bulk RNA-seq, single-cell data, and clinical data for multiple myeloma subtype discovery.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: LinkedIn headline frames this as Machine Learning Engineer | Bioinformatician.

timeline_events.title: ASH Abstract Achievement Award (2 awards)
timeline_events.summary: The CV lists two ASH Abstract Achievement Awards in 2024.

timeline_events.title: Presenter at UKC FIRE 2025
timeline_events.summary: CV lists UKC FIRE 2025 presentation and 2nd place distinction.

timeline_events.title: CLML / IMS abstract published and presented
timeline_events.summary: Second-author abstract in the 22nd IMS Annual Meeting supplement.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: 389 patients; 6 clusters; HR 4.46 versus Cluster 6; p<0.001.

timeline_events.title: Two additional 2025 Blood abstracts verified
timeline_events.summary: Two 2025 Blood abstracts are visible in Scholar and now verified through Crossref, official Blood pages, and local PDFs.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: One covers SETD8 targeting; one covers 159 patients and 435000 cells in high-risk MM.

timeline_events.title: Organizer, Katalyst 2025
timeline_events.summary: CV indicates organizer role in Katalyst 2025.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: Programming and logistics for 200+ attendees according to CV phrasing.

timeline_events.title: JMC SETD8 inhibitor article published
timeline_events.summary: Full Journal of Medicinal Chemistry article on SETD8 inhibitor discovery.
timeline_events.quantifiable_details: Lead compound IC50 0.14 +/- 0.04 uM; tested across 20 methyltransferases; MM cell IC50 values 1.06 and 0.54 uM in named lines.

projects.title: Diabetic Hospital Readmission
projects.quantitative_claims: F1 improved 0.00 to 0.4479; ROC AUC improved 0.5000 to 0.5449; dataset described as 10 years across 130 US hospitals.

projects.title: Pneumonia X-ray Recognition
projects.quantitative_claims: README cites about 6000 pediatric chest X-rays; conclusion text reports 99.7% recall and 99% accuracy.
projects.notes: Should be described as a training or adapted project because the repository is a fork.

projects.title: Flu-vaccine-P3-Project
projects.notes: Visible original public repo from the Flatiron period.

outputs.title: E2F1 Is a Biomarker of Selinexor Resistance in Relapsed/Refractory Multiple Myeloma Patients
outputs.topic: selinexor resistance in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma
outputs.methods: RNA-seq; DESeq2; STAR; featureCounts; Affymetrix validation; western blotting
outputs.notes: Official record uses early publication name variant Seongjee Park.

outputs.title: Aberrant Cell Cycle Programming Confers Rapid Lethality in the EuSOX11+ CCND1 MCL Mouse Model
outputs.methods: transgenic mouse model; RNA-seq; pathway analysis; survival analysis
outputs.notes: Official record uses early publication name variant Seongjee Park.

outputs.title: Immune Profiling Reveals Distinct Features of Multiple Myeloma Subtypes Defined By Multi-Omics Network Analysis
outputs.topic: immune features of multiple myeloma subtypes from multi-omics network analysis
outputs.notes: CV marks this abstract as award-winning.

outputs.title: Single-Cell Analysis Reveals Depletion of Antigen-Presenting Cell (APC) and IFN-Stimulated CD4 T Cell Populations in High-Risk Newly Diagnosed Multiple Myeloma Patients
outputs.topic: high-risk newly diagnosed multiple myeloma and immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment
outputs.methods: 10X 5' scRNA-seq; WES integration; Seurat; InferCNV; CellphoneDB
outputs.notes: CV marks this abstract as award-winning.

outputs.title: Integrating Microenvironment with Tumor Multi-Omic using Unsupervised Machine Learning to Model Heterogeneity Refines Multiple Myeloma Subtypes and Reveals Immune-Based Clusters with Prognostic Impact
outputs.topic: multiple myeloma subtype refinement with tumor and microenvironment data
outputs.methods: similarity network fusion; spectral clustering; WES; RNA-seq; CyTOF; multivariate Cox regression
outputs.notes: Presented in the 22nd International Myeloma Society Annual Meeting supplement.

outputs.title: Epigenetic targeting of SETD8 in multiple myeloma
outputs.topic: epigenetic targeting of SETD8 in multiple myeloma
outputs.methods: gene and protein correlation; ex vivo assays; MM cell viability assays
outputs.notes: Official abstract page, DOI, and local PDF are now verified.

outputs.title: Shared immune features correspond to high-risk multiple myeloma across multiple human subtypes and murine models
outputs.topic: shared immune features in high-risk multiple myeloma
outputs.methods: single-cell analysis; tumor clone fraction analysis; cross-model immune profiling
outputs.notes: Official abstract page, DOI, and local PDF are now verified.

outputs.title: Discovery of a Potent, Selective, and In Vivo Efficacious Covalent Inhibitor for Lysine Methyltransferase SETD8
outputs.topic: SETD8 inhibitor discovery in multiple myeloma
outputs.methods: covalent inhibitor design; mass spectrometry; X-ray crystallography; cell assays; xenograft models

output_metrics.metric_context: STORM trial response rate cited in abstract background
SETD8 gene-expression correlation with protein levels
reported viability effect across MM cells
